descriptions.songAnnouncements: Whether the bot should announce every song in a new message when it starts playing. Set to `true` or `1` to enable.
descriptions.prefix: The prefix used to trigger commands.
descriptions.pfp: What profile picture the bot should use. Presets: `default | dark | light | mono | <custom url>`.
descriptions.locale: The preferred language of your server.
descriptions.stay_247: 24/7 saved voice channels for this server. Supports multiple channels and is managed automatically by $prefix247 — do not edit manually.
descriptions.stay_247_mode: Legacy guild-wide 24/7 mode. Superseded by stay_247_modes (per-channel). Kept for backward compatibility.
descriptions.stay_247_modes: Per-channel 24/7 mode map. Format: {"channelId": "on"|"auto"|"off"}. Managed automatically by $prefix247 — do not edit manually.
descriptions.volume: The default playback volume for this server (1-200). Saved automatically when you use $prefixvolume. Restored every time the bot joins a channel.
descriptions.announcementChannelId: The channel where song announcements are sent. Managed automatically — do not edit manually.
